items.title: Immunoglobulin G exacerbates endothelial-microglial crosstalk, promoting secondary injury in high-altitude cerebral edema.
items.authors: Yan Xue; Meijuan Qian; Dongzhi Wang; Baolan Wan; Jun Wang; Mingming Zhou; Xiaoxiao Chen; Yuhua Chen
items.abstract: Hypobaric hypoxia (HH)-induced blood-brain barrier (BBB) disruption is a critical pathological event in high-altitude cerebral edema (HACE). However, the mechanistic role of extravasated immunoglobulin G (IgG) in this process remains insufficiently characterized. This study elucidates that leaked IgG actively contributes to neuroinflammation and BBB impairment under HH conditions, functioning beyond being a passive biomarker. Using both in vivo and in vitro models, we demonstrated that HH rapidly induces Caveolin-1-dependent transcytosis of IgG across endothelial cells as an early event, preceding the degradation of TJs. Internalized IgG activated NF-κB signaling in endothelial cells, leading to the downregulation of Claudin-5 and ZO-1 and promoting NLRP3 inflammasome assembly. Concurrently, extravasated IgG drove microglial polarization toward a pro-inflammatory M1 phenotype, marked by increased IL-1β expression and p65 phosphorylation. Inhibition of Caveolin-1 using methyl-β-cyclodextrin (MβCD) significantly reduced IgG uptake, suppressed endothelial inflammatory signaling, and attenuated microglial activation, thereby preserving BBB integrity. These findings support the "two-hit" model, in which Caveolin-1-mediated IgG transcytosis initiates a feed-forward loop of neuroinflammation and BBB disruption. Our results identify Caveolin-1 as a promising therapeutic target and provide mechanistic insights into HACE pathogenesis, offering a foundation for novel preventive and treatment strategies.

items.title_cn: 免疫球蛋白 G 加剧内皮-小胶质细胞串扰，促进高原脑水肿的继发性损伤。
items.abstract_cn: 低压缺氧（HH）引起的血脑屏障（BBB）破坏是高原脑水肿（HACE）的关键病理事件。然而，外渗免疫球蛋白 G (IgG) 在此过程中的机制作用仍未得到充分表征。这项研究阐明，在 HH 条件下，泄漏的 IgG 会主动导致神经炎症和 BBB 损伤，其功能不仅仅是被动生物标志物。使用体内和体外模型，我们证明 HH 快速诱导 Caveolin-1 依赖性 IgG 跨内皮细胞转胞吞作用，这是 TJ 降解之前的早期事件。内化的 IgG 激活内皮细胞中的 NF-κB 信号传导，导致 Claudin-5 和 ZO-1 下调并促进 NLRP3 炎性体组装。同时，外渗的 IgG 驱动小胶质细胞极化向促炎 M1 表型，其标志是 IL-1β 表达增加和 p65 磷酸化。使用甲基-β-环糊精 (MβCD) 抑制 Caveolin-1 可显着减少 IgG 摄取，抑制内皮炎症信号传导，并减弱小胶质细胞活化，从而保持 BBB 完整性。这些发现支持“两次打击”模型，其中 Caveolin-1 介导的 IgG 转胞吞作用启动神经炎症和 BBB 破坏的前馈循环。我们的结果将 Caveolin-1 确定为一个有前途的治疗靶点，并为 HACE 发病机制提供了机制见解，为新型预防和治疗策略奠定了基础。

items.title: LRP1 Activation Promotes Metabolic Reprogramming and Mrc1 Expression to Attenuate LPS-Induced Cognitive Deficits: An Integrated Omics Analysis.
items.authors: Mengyao Qu; Yanan He; Lu Yu; Huikai Yang; Yixun Lu; Yingfu Li; Rui Wang; Miao Sun
items.abstract: AIM: Central insulin resistance and neuroinflammation act as synergistic drivers in the pathogenesis of cognitive decline. While the low-density lipoprotein receptor-related protein 1 (LRP1) is known to maintain blood-brain barrier integrity, its capacity to decouple the inflammation-metabolism axis remains underexplored. This study investigates whether activation of LRP1 can ameliorate LPS-induced cognitive deficits by recalibrating cerebral glucose metabolism. METHODS: We utilized an integrative approach combining behavioral phenotyping with targeted metabolomics and transcriptomics to dissect the neuroprotective mechanism of SP16, a selective LRP1 agonist. Cognitive dysfunction was modeled in mice via intracerebroventricular (i.c.v) LPS administration, followed by systemic intervention with intraperitoneally (i.p) injected SP16. RESULTS: SP16 treatment preserved cognitive function and prevented neuronal structural atrophy against the LPS injection. Mechanistically, LRP1 activation did more than suppress inflammation; it functionally modulated hippocampal insulin sensitivity and re-established redox homeostasis. Crucially, metabolomic profiling highlighted a restoration of glycolytic flux, centered on the normalization of fructose-1,6-bisphosphate (FBP) levels. This metabolic reprogramming coincided with the upregulation of the M2-like reparative marker, Mrc1. CONCLUSION: Our findings identify LRP1 as a regulator that bridges metabolic health and immune resolution. By enforcing a metabolic shift via the FBP node, SP16 effectively guides microglia from a pro-inflammatory state toward tissue repair. Thus, honing in on SP16-mediated metabolic reprogramming presents an opportunity for a therapeutic intervention against neuroinflammation-associated cognitive impairment, offering a more nuanced alternative to broad-spectrum anti-inflammatories.
items.title_en: LRP1 Activation Promotes Metabolic Reprogramming and Mrc1 Expression to Attenuate LPS-Induced Cognitive Deficits: An Integrated Omics Analysis.
items.title_cn: LRP1 激活促进代谢重编程和 Mrc1 表达，以减轻 LPS 诱导的认知缺陷：综合组学分析。
items.abstract_cn: 目的：中枢胰岛素抵抗和神经炎症在认知能力下降的发病机制中发挥协同驱动作用。虽然已知低密度脂蛋白受体相关蛋白 1 (LRP1) 可以维持血脑屏障的完整性，但其解耦炎症代谢轴的能力仍未得到充分研究。本研究探讨 LRP1 的激活是否可以通过重新校准脑葡萄糖代谢来改善 LPS 诱导的认知缺陷。方法：我们采用行为表型分析与靶向代谢组学和转录组学相结合的综合方法来剖析 SP16（一种选择性 LRP1 激动剂）的神经保护机制。通过脑室内 (i.c.v) LPS 给药，然后通过腹膜内 (i.p) 注射 SP16 进行全身干预，在小鼠中建立认知功能障碍模型。结果：SP16 治疗保留了 LPS 注射后的认知功能并防止了神经元结构萎缩。从机制上讲，LRP1 激活不仅仅能抑制炎症；它在功能上调节海马胰岛素敏感性并重新建立氧化还原稳态。至关重要的是，代谢组学分析强调了糖酵解通量的恢复，重点是果糖 1,6-二磷酸 (FBP) 水平的正常化。这种代谢重编程与 M2 样修复标记 Mrc1 的上调同时发生。结论：我们的研究结果确定 LRP1 是连接代谢健康和免疫解决的调节剂。通过 FBP 节点强制代谢转变，SP16 有效引导小胶质细胞从促炎状态转向组织修复。因此，研究 SP16 介导的代谢重编程为针对神经炎症相关认知障碍的治疗干预提供了机会，为广谱抗炎药提供了更细致的替代方案。

items.title: Electrical stimulation promotes longevity and regeneration in a colonial chordate.
items.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.authors: Jos Domen; Yotam Voskoboynik; Tom Levy; Erica M Domen; Katherine J Ishizuka; Karla J Palmeri; Chiara Anselmi; Thomas Rolander
items.abstract: Endogenous bioelectric currents regulate development and regeneration, but their influence on organismal longevity and stem cell-mediated repair is not well understood. We demonstrate that a brief, clinically safe pulse of electrical current (PEC) produces lasting rejuvenation in the colonial chordate Botryllus schlosseri. In this species where all differentiated tissues are replaced weekly and progenitor populations mediate the weekly de novo generation of new organs, organismal aging is directly driven by alterations of the precursor pool. Electrically stimulated colonies exhibited increased growth, enhanced reproductive activity, and significantly improved survival, along with improved stem cell associated function. Whole-transcriptome analysis revealed a biphasic "reboot and rebound" program across all functional paths. An acute 2-h "reboot" was defined by the synchronized downregulation of the genomic engine, mitochondrial respiratory chain, contractile apparatus, and extracellular matrix (ECM) integrity. This systemic pause transitioned into a massive 24-h "rebound", characterized by the global reactivation of these paths, including a metabolic surge, cytoskeletal rebuilding, and ECM scaffold synthesis. Notably, PEC induced a conserved immunometabolic shift from a proinflammatory to a reparative signature, mimicking exercise-induced shifts observed in mammals. Our findings identify that PEC acts directly on progenitor-cell-driven pathways to restore homeostatic vitality, offering insights into the reversal of age-related decline.
items.title_en: Electrical stimulation promotes longevity and regeneration in a colonial chordate.
items.title_cn: 电刺激可促进殖民脊索动物的寿命和再生。
items.abstract_cn: 内源生物电流调节发育和再生，但它们对有机体寿命和干细胞介导的修复的影响尚不清楚。我们证明，短暂的、临床上安全的电流脉冲 (PEC) 可以使群居脊索动物 Botryllus schlosseri 产生持久的恢复活力。在该物种中，所有分化组织每周更换一次，祖细胞群每周介导新器官的从头生成，有机体衰老是由前体库的改变直接驱动的。电刺激的集落表现出生长加快、繁殖活性增强、存活率显着提高，以及干细胞相关功能的改善。全转录组分析揭示了所有功能路径上的双相“重启和反弹”程序。急性 2 小时“重启”的定义是基因组引擎、线粒体呼吸链、收缩装置和细胞外基质 (ECM) 完整性的同步下调。这种系统性暂停转变为大规模的 24 小时“反弹”，其特征是这些路径的整体重新激活，包括代谢激增、细胞骨架重建和 ECM 支架合成。值得注意的是，PEC 诱导了保守的免疫代谢从促炎性到修复性的转变，模仿了在哺乳动物中观察到的运动引起的转变。我们的研究结果表明，PEC 直接作用于祖细胞驱动的途径，以恢复稳态活力，为逆转与年龄相关的衰退提供了见解。

核心发现：内源生物电流调节发育和再生，但它们对有机体寿命和干细胞介导的修复的影响尚不清楚。我们证明，短暂的、临床上安全的电流脉冲 (PEC) 可以使群居脊索动物 Botryllus schlosseri 产生持久的恢复活力。在该物种中，所有分化组织每周更换一次，祖细胞群每周介导新器官的从头生成，有机体衰老是由前体库的改变直接驱动的。电刺激的集落表现出生长加快、繁殖活性增强、存活率显着提高，以及干细胞相关功能的改善。全转录组分析揭示了所有功能路径上的双相“重启和反弹”程序。急性 2 小时“重启”的定义是基因组引擎、线粒体呼吸链、收缩装置和细胞外基质 (ECM) 完整性的同步下调。这种系统性暂停转变为大规模的 24 小时“反弹”，其特征是这些路径的整体重新激活，包括代谢激增、细胞骨架重建和 ECM 支架合成。值得注意的是，PEC 诱导了保守的免疫代谢从促炎性到修复性的转变，模仿了在哺乳动物中观察到的运动引起的转变。我们的研究结果表明，PEC 直接作用于祖细胞驱动的途径，以恢复稳态活力，为逆转与年龄相关的衰退提供了见解。

items.title: Protocol to generate microglia-containing cerebral organoids to model HIV neuroinflammation.
items.authors: Janet P Zayas; David Gagliardi; Stephanie Gambut; Sam Acors; Nathalia Almeida; Michael H Malim; Luis Apolonia; Lena Al-Harthi
items.abstract: Cerebral organoids (COs) are valuable for studying neurodegenerative diseases and pathogens, but their limited microglia pose challenges. Here, we present a protocol to generate organoids with physiologically relevant microglia (CO-iMs). We describe steps for differentiating induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs) into mesoderm, seeding embryoid bodies (EBs), and harvesting hematopoietic progenitor cells (HPCs). We detail procedures for co-culturing HPCs and iPSCs to generate CO-iMs, followed by their infection and treatment. The model provides a platform to study viral infections and neuroinflammation. For complete details on the use and execution of this protocol, please refer to Narasipura et al.1.
items.title_en: Protocol to generate microglia-containing cerebral organoids to model HIV neuroinflammation.
items.title_cn: 生成含有小胶质细胞的脑类器官来模拟 HIV 神经炎症的方案。
items.abstract_cn: 大脑类器官（CO）对于研究神经退行性疾病和病原体很有价值，但其有限的小胶质细胞带来了挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种生成具有生理相关小胶质细胞（CO-iMs）的类器官的协议。我们描述了将诱导多能干细胞 (iPSC) 分化为中胚层、播种胚状体 (EB) 和收获造血祖细胞 (HPC) 的步骤。我们详细介绍了共培养 HPC 和 iPSC 以生成 CO-iM，然后进行感染和治疗的程序。该模型提供了研究病毒感染和神经炎症的平台。有关该协议的使用和执行的完整详细信息，请参阅 Narasipura 等人1。

items.title: Integration of TSPO PET and fluid biomarkers to assess neuroinflammation in Parkinson's disease.
items.journal: European journal of nuclear medicine and molecular imaging
items.authors: Skye Hsin-Hsien Yeh; Tsung-Hsun Yu; Chia-Ju Liu; Sung-Pin Fan; Pin-Shiuan Chen; Cheng-Hsuan Li; Mei-Fang Cheng; Chin-Hsien Lin
items.abstract: PURPOSE: Microglia-mediated neuroinflammation is implicated in Parkinson's disease (PD), but its relationship with clinical severity remains controversial. Using [18F]FEPPA translocator protein (TSPO) PET with plasma biomarkers, we examined associations among neuroinflammation, glial activation, neuronal injury, and motor and cognitive impairment. METHODS: Ninety participants (71 patients with PD and 19 age-matched controls) underwent TSPO PET and plasma measurements of soluble triggering receptor expression on myeloid cells-2 (sTREM2), glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP), and neurofilament light chain (NfL). Binding potential relative to the non-displaceable compartment (BPND) was quantified across cortical and subcortical regions. Motor severity was assessed with Movement Disorder Society-Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale (MDS-UPDRS) part III and Hoehn-Yahr stage in the off state. Cognitive performance was evaluated using the Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) and Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA). PD dementia (PDD) was diagnosed according to MDS Task Force criteria. RESULTS: Patients with PD had higher TSPO BPND in the basal ganglia than controls (p = 0.01), most prominent in advanced motor stage (Hoehn-Yahr ≥ 3) and PDD, particularly in the pallidum (p < 0.01). Higher MDS-UPDRS part III scores correlated with increased BPND in the bilateral putamen and frontal and parietal cortices. Patients with PDD had significantly higher pallidal BPND than those without cognitive impairment and controls (both p < 0.001). Higher pallidal BPND was associated with worse global cognitive performance (MMSE, MoCA) and correlated with plasma NfL, GFAP, and sTREM2 levels, especially in patients with advanced disease. CONCLUSION: TSPO PET with plasma biomarkers revealed region-specific neuroinflammation associated with motor and cognitive severity in Parkinson's disease progression.
items.title_en: Integration of TSPO PET and fluid biomarkers to assess neuroinflammation in Parkinson's disease.
items.title_cn: 整合 TSPO PET 和液体生物标志物来评估帕金森病的神经炎症。
items.abstract_cn: 目的：小胶质细胞介导的神经炎症与帕金森病（PD）有关，但其与临床严重程度的关系仍存在争议。使用 [18F]FEPPA 易位蛋白 (TSPO) PET 和血浆生物标志物，我们检查了神经炎症、神经胶质活化、神经元损伤以及运动和认知障碍之间的关联。方法：90 名参与者（71 名 PD 患者和 19 名年龄匹配的对照）接受了 TSPO PET 和血浆测量，测量骨髓细胞 2 (sTREM2)、胶质纤维酸性蛋白 (GFAP) 和神经丝轻链 (NfL) 上可溶性触发受体的表达。对皮质和皮质下区域相对于不可移位室 (BPND) 的结合潜力进行了量化。运动严重程度通过运动障碍协会统一帕金森病评定量表 (MDS-UPDRS) 第三部分和关闭状态下的 Hoehn-Yahr 阶段进行评估。使用简易精神状态检查（MMSE）和蒙特利尔认知评估（MoCA）来评估认知表现。 PD 痴呆 (PDD) 根据 MDS 工作组标准诊断。结果：PD 患者基底节的 TSPO BPND 高于对照组 (p = 0.01)，在晚期运动期 (Hoehn-Yahr ≥ 3) 和 PDD 中最为突出，特别是在苍白球 (p < 0.01)。较高的 MDS-UPDRS 第 III 部分评分与双侧壳核、额叶和顶叶皮质的 BPND 增加相关。 PDD 患者的苍白球 BPND 显着高于无认知障碍患者和对照组（均 p < 0.001）。较高的苍白球 BPND 与较差的整体认知表现（MMSE、MoCA）相关，并与血浆 NfL、GFAP 和 sTREM2 水平相关，尤其是在晚期疾病患者中。结论：带有血浆生物标志物的 TSPO PET 显示了与帕金森病进展中运动和认知严重程度相关的区域特异性神经炎症。

items.title: Reversible loss of hematopoietic stem cells transplant potency by chronic Salmonella infection.
items.authors: Erez Elfassy; Omri Koren; Pinkhas Likhterov; Roshina Thapa; Ofir Cohen; Roi Gazit
items.abstract: Hematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) sustain blood and immune cell production. Acute Salmonella infection activates HSCs and disrupts hematopoiesis; surprisingly, however, the effect of chronic infection remains unclear. Here, we show that chronic Salmonella infection significantly impair stem and progenitor cells of the bone marrow. As early as 14 days post-infection, the transplantation potency of HSCs is depleted. Single-cell RNA sequencing reveal a myeloid bias and a shift of HSCs toward a cycling state. Notably, curative antibiotic treatment reverses the molecular changes, restoring a healthy-like HSC state. In agreement, functional recovery of potency is confirmed by competitive transplantation assays. These findings uncover a profound and reversible loss of HSC's transplantation during chronic Salmonella infection. Our findings highlight the importance of considering the donor's immune status in HSC transplantation.
items.title_en: Reversible loss of hematopoietic stem cells transplant potency by chronic Salmonella infection.
items.title_cn: 慢性沙门氏菌感染导致造血干细胞移植效力可逆性丧失。
items.abstract_cn: 造血干细胞 (HSC) 维持血液和免疫细胞的产生。急性沙门氏菌感染会激活造血干细胞并扰乱造血功能；然而令人惊讶的是，慢性感染的影响仍不清楚。在这里，我们发现慢性沙门氏菌感染会显着损害骨髓的干细胞和祖细胞。早在感染后 14 天，HSC 的移植效力就已耗尽。单细胞 RNA 测序揭示了骨髓偏向和 HSC 向循环状态的转变。值得注意的是，治疗性抗生素治疗可逆转分子变化，恢复 HSC 的健康状态。一致认为，竞争性移植测定证实了效力的功能恢复。这些发现揭示了慢性沙门氏菌感染期间造血干细胞移植的严重且可逆的损失。我们的研究结果强调了在 HSC 移植中考虑供体免疫状态的重要性。

items.title: Understanding exosomes in regenerative dentistry.
items.authors: Paras Ahmad; Anton Sculean; Richard J Miron
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Regenerative dentistry is shifting from cell-based strategies to cell-free biologics capable of orchestrating intricate tissue repair. Exosomes, nanosized extracellular vesicles carrying bioactive molecular payloads, have emerged as central modulators of intercellular communication. This review aimed to offer a comprehensive synthesis of exosome-based regenerative processes across oral and craniomaxillofacial (CMF) tissues. METHODS: A structured literature review was performed utilizing PubMed, Scopus, and Web of Science databases without time restriction. Eligible studies included in vitro, in vivo, and clinical investigations assessing exosome-based mechanisms, molecular signaling pathways, and bioengineering approaches in regenerative dentistry. RESULTS: Exosomes derived from stem cells, immune cells, and dental tissues showed multifaceted regenerative impacts across periodontal, endodontic, orthodontic, and CMF applications. Mechanistically, exosomes mediated osteogenesis, angiogenesis, immune regulation, oxidative stress, and stem cell recruitment through central pathways, such as the PI3K/AKT, MAPK/ERK, Wnt/β-catenin, TGF-β/BMP, and NF-κB. They enhanced macrophage polarization toward anti-inflammatory phenotypes, restored osteoclast-osteoblast homeostasis, enhanced angiogenesis, and preserved mitochondrial homeostasis. In regenerative endodontics, exosomes enhanced cell viability, decreased apoptosis, and improved odontogenic differentiation and neurovascular coupling. In orthodontic and CMF regeneration, they coordinated mechanotransduction, osteogenesis, and angiogenesis. Bioengineering approaches, such as scaffold-mediated platforms, preconditioning, and genetic modification, further improved exosome stability, targeting, and treatment efficacy. CONCLUSION: Exosomes represent a versatile and robust cell-free treatment approach capable of orchestrating intricate oral tissue regeneration. Despite promising preclinical evidence, challenges associated with standardization, scalability, and clinical validation must be addressed to allow translation in routine dental practice.
items.title_cn: 了解再生牙科中的外泌体。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：再生牙科正在从基于细胞的策略转向能够协调复杂组织修复的无细胞生物制剂。外泌体是携带生物活性分子有效负载的纳米级细胞外囊泡，已成为细胞间通讯的中心调节剂。本综述旨在全面综合口腔和颅颌面（CMF）组织中基于外泌体的再生过程。方法：利用 PubMed、Scopus 和 Web of Science 数据库进行结构化文献综述，不受时间限制。符合条件的研究包括体外、体内和临床研究，评估再生牙科中基于外泌体的机制、分子信号传导途径和生物工程方法。结果：源自干细胞、免疫细胞和牙组织的外泌体在牙周、牙髓、正畸和 CMF 应用中表现出多方面的再生影响。从机制上讲，外泌体通过 PI3K/AKT、MAPK/ERK、Wnt/β-catenin、TGF-β/BMP 和 NF-κB 等中央通路介导成骨、血管生成、免疫调节、氧化应激和干细胞招募。它们增强了巨噬细胞向抗炎表型的极化，恢复了破骨细胞-成骨细胞的稳态，增强了血管生成，并保持了线粒体稳态。在再生牙髓学中，外泌体增强细胞活力，减少细胞凋亡，并改善牙源分化和神经血管耦合。在正畸和 CMF 再生中，它们协调机械传导、成骨和血管生成。生物工程方法，例如支架介导的平台、预处理和基因修饰，进一步提高了外泌体的稳定性、靶向性和治疗功效。结论：外泌体代表了一种多功能且强大的无细胞治疗方法，能够协调复杂的口腔组织再生。尽管临床前证据有希望，但必须解决与标准化、可扩展性和临床验证相关的挑战，以便在常规牙科实践中进行转化。

items.title: Surface N-Glycosylation Dictates MSC-EV Uptake and CCR2-Driven Monocyte Recruitment to Inflamed Endothelium Under Shear Flow.
items.authors: Marta Clos-Sansalvador; Marta Monguió-Tortajada; Sergio G Garcia; Manuel Pérez-Martínez; Marta Sanroque-Muñoz; Miriam Font-Morón; Diego Megías; Isabel Peset
items.abstract: Mesenchymal stromal cell-derived extracellular vesicles (MSC-EV) hold promising potential for immunomodulation and tissue regeneration, especially for treating ischemia-reperfusion injury (IRI). However, their therapeutic use is hindered by challenges in tissue targeting and incomplete understanding of their functional mechanisms. Upon systemic administration, MSC-EV first encounter IRI-activated endothelium, whose response would determine the nature and extent of subsequent immune cell infiltration and inflammation, with monocytes shaping the type of immune response. Our previous work showed that surface N-glycans are key for MSC-EV interaction with endothelial cells. Here, we investigate the role of N-glycosylation in MSC-EV interaction with TNF-activated endothelial cells and subsequent monocyte rolling and adhesion. Using static and dynamic flow in vitro models, we show that depletion of surface N-glycans specifically targeted MSC-EV to inflamed endothelium. Conversely, while intact MSC-EV inhibited monocyte adhesion and fostered MSC recruitment to endothelial cells, this was lost upon N-glycan depletion. Finally, our results suggest that MSC-EV-mediated modulation of the MCP-1/CCR2 interaction may underlie the reduced monocyte infiltration into inflamed endothelium. These findings highlight the role of N-glycosylation in the immunomodulatory activity of MSC-EV, offering a potential mechanism of action and suggesting that glycoengineered MSC-EV may enhance their therapeutic effectiveness in inflammatory and ischemic conditions.
items.title_en: Surface N-Glycosylation Dictates MSC-EV Uptake and CCR2-Driven Monocyte Recruitment to Inflamed Endothelium Under Shear Flow.
items.title_cn: 表面 N-糖基化决定 MSC-EV 的摄取和 CCR2 驱动的单核细胞在剪切流下募集至发炎的内皮细胞。
items.abstract_cn: 间充质基质细胞衍生的细胞外囊泡（MSC-EV）在免疫调节和组织再生方面具有广阔的潜力，特别是在治疗缺血再灌注损伤（IRI）方面。然而，它们的治疗用途受到组织靶向方面的挑战和对其功能机制的不完全理解的阻碍。全身给药后，MSC-EV 首先遇到 IRI 激活的内皮细胞，其反应将决定随后免疫细胞浸润和炎症的性质和程度，而单核细胞则决定免疫反应的类型。我们之前的工作表明，表面 N-聚糖是 MSC-EV 与内皮细胞相互作用的关键。在这里，我们研究了 N-糖基化在 MSC-EV 与 TNF 激活的内皮细胞相互作用以及随后的单核细胞滚动和粘附中的作用。使用静态和动态流体外模型，我们表明表面 N-聚糖的消耗特异性地将 MSC-EV 靶向发炎的内皮。相反，虽然完整的 MSC-EV 抑制单核细胞粘附并促进 MSC 募集到内皮细胞，但这种作用在 N-聚糖耗尽后就会消失。最后，我们的结果表明，MSC-EV 介导的 MCP-1/CCR2 相互作用的调节可能是单核细胞浸润到发炎内皮细胞减少的基础。这些发现强调了 N-糖基化在 MSC-EV 免疫调节活性中的作用，提供了潜在的作用机制，并表明糖基化的 MSC-EV 可能增强其在炎症和缺血性疾病中的治疗效果。

items.title: MRI-guided diagnosis and dual-pathway neuroprotection in ischemic stroke
items.authors: Ju Bai; Wei Liu; Zhiyuan Wang; Bin Han; Hongzhao Qi; Jinping Sun
items.abstract: Ischemic stroke (IS) presents a formidable clinical challenge due to its complex pathophysiology, encompassing neuroinflammation and oxidative stress, alongside the lack of comprehensive diagnostic and therapeutic strategies. To address this, we designed a plant-based theranostic nanoplatform by coating apple exosome-like nanoparticles (ELNs) with polydopamine (PDA) and chelating gadolinium ions (Gd), denoted as PDA@ELNs/Gd. This platform exhibits enhanced penetration of the blood-brain barrier (BBB) and targeted accumulation in ischemic brain regions. The PDA coating serves as both a substrate for Gd chelation, enabling robust T1-weighted magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) contrast for non-invasive lesion detection, and a synergistic partner with the bioactive components of apple ELNs to provide dual-pathway neuroprotection. In vitro studies demonstrated that PDA@ELNs/Gd effectively scavenges reactive oxygen species, reprograms microglia from the proinflammatory M1 phenotype to the anti-inflammatory M2 phenotype, and inhibits activation of the NF-κB/NLRP3 pathway. In a photothrombotic stroke (PT) mouse model, PDA@ELNs/Gd selectively accumulated in the ischemic hemisphere, provided clear MRI contrast, alleviated cerebral infarction injury, and significantly enhanced neurobehavioral recovery by protecting the ischemic penumbra. Transcriptomic analysis further revealed that PDA@ELNs/Gd extensively regulated pathways associated with neuroinflammation, extracellular matrix remodeling, and cell survival. Comprehensive biosafety studies affirmed minimal systemic toxicity. This work establishes a biocompatible, plant-derived theranostic platform that integrates MRI-guided diagnostics with multimodal therapy, representing a promising advancement in precise IS treatment.
items.title_en: MRI-guided diagnosis and dual-pathway neuroprotection in ischemic stroke
items.title_cn: 缺血性脑卒中的 MRI 引导诊断和双通路神经保护
items.abstract_cn: 缺血性中风（IS）因其复杂的病理生理学（包括神经炎症和氧化应激）而提出了巨大的临床挑战，同时缺乏全面的诊断和治疗策略。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种基于植物的治疗诊断纳米平台，通过用聚多巴胺（PDA）和螯合钆离子（Gd）涂覆苹果外泌体样纳米粒子（ELN），表示为PDA@ELNs/Gd。该平台表现出增强的血脑屏障（BBB）渗透力和在缺血性脑区域的靶向积累。 PDA 涂层既可作为 Gd 螯合的基质，为非侵入性病变检测提供强大的 T1 加权磁共振成像 (MRI) 对比，又可与苹果 ELN 的生物活性成分协同合作，提供双途径神经保护。体外研究表明，PDA@ELNs/Gd 能有效清除活性氧，将小胶质细胞从促炎 M1 表型重编程为抗炎 M2 表型，并抑制 NF-κB/NLRP3 通路的激活。在光血栓性中风（PT）小鼠模型中，PDA@ELNs/Gd选择性地积聚在缺血半球，提供清晰的MRI对比度，减轻脑梗死损伤，并通过保护缺血半暗带显着增强神经行为恢复。转录组分析进一步表明，PDA@ELNs/Gd 广泛调节与神经炎症、细胞外基质重塑和细胞存活相关的通路。综合生物安全研究证实其全身毒性极小。这项工作建立了一个生物相容性、植物源性治疗诊断平台，将 MRI 引导诊断与多模式治疗相结合，代表了精确 IS 治疗的一个有希望的进步。

核心发现：缺血性中风（IS）因其复杂的病理生理学（包括神经炎症和氧化应激）而提出了巨大的临床挑战，同时缺乏全面的诊断和治疗策略。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种基于植物的治疗诊断纳米平台，通过用聚多巴胺（PDA）和螯合钆离子（Gd）涂覆苹果外泌体样纳米粒子（ELN），表示为PDA@ELNs/Gd。该平台表现出增强的血脑屏障（BBB）渗透力和在缺血性脑区域的靶向积累。 PDA 涂层既可作为 Gd 螯合的基质，为非侵入性病变检测提供强大的 T1 加权磁共振成像 (MRI) 对比，又可与苹果 ELN 的生物活性成分协同合作，提供双途径神经保护。体外研究表明，PDA@ELNs/Gd 能有效清除活性氧，将小胶质细胞从促炎 M1 表型重编程为抗炎 M2 表型，并抑制 NF-κB/NLRP3 通路的激活。在光血栓性中风（PT）小鼠模型中，PDA@ELNs/Gd选择性地积聚在缺血半球，提供清晰的MRI对比度，减轻脑梗死损伤，并通过保护缺血半暗带显着增强神经行为恢复。转录组分析进一步表明，PDA@ELNs/Gd 广泛调节与神经炎症、细胞外基质重塑和细胞存活相关的通路。综合生物安全研究证实其全身毒性极小。这项工作建立了一个生物相容性、植物源性治疗诊断平台，将 MRI 引导诊断与多模式治疗相结合，代表了精确 IS 治疗的一个有希望的进步。

items.title: Adjunctive Methylprednisolone After Thrombectomy: A Secondary Analysis Stratified by Admission White Blood Cell Count.
items.authors: Chengsong Yue; Jie Yang; Dahong Yang; Guanting Heng; Linyu Li; Shihai Yang; Xuanyu Chen; Yi Lin
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Leukocyte-driven inflammation may contribute to reperfusion-outcome mismatch after thrombectomy. We tested whether admission white blood cell (WBC) count may identify reperfused patients more likely to benefit from adjunctive methylprednisolone. METHODS: This post hoc secondary analysis of the MARVEL randomized, placebo-controlled trial was conducted with a prospectively finalized statistical analysis plan. We included patients with anterior-circulation large-vessel occlusion stroke who achieved successful reperfusion after thrombectomy and received intravenous methylprednisolone or placebo. The analysis included 1201 patients stratified by admission WBC count (< 10 × 109/L, n = 808; ≥ 10 × 109/L, n = 393). The primary outcome was 90-day modified Rankin Scale (mRS 0-6) using covariate-adjusted ordinal logistic regression. Secondary outcomes included mRS 0-3 and 0-4, early NIHSS, mortality, symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage (sICH), any intracranial hemorrhage, pneumonia, and gastrointestinal bleeding. RESULTS: The treatment × WBC interaction reached nominal statistical significance (p = 0.04). In patients with WBC ≥ 10 × 109/L, methylprednisolone was associated with a more favorable 90-day ordinal mRS distribution (adjusted common OR, 1.59; 95% CI, 1.11-2.28), higher odds of mRS 0-3 and 0-4, and lower mortality (aOR, 0.60; 95% CI, 0.37-0.96) and pneumonia (aOR, 0.61; 95% CI, 0.40-0.93), without an apparent increase in hemorrhage or gastrointestinal bleeding. No clear benefit was observed in patients with WBC < 10 × 109/L. CONCLUSIONS: Higher admission WBC was associated with more favorable estimated treatment effects from adjunctive methylprednisolone after thrombectomy, warranting prospective validation. TRIAL REGISTRATION: Chinese Clinical Trial Registry (ChiCTR.org.cn); ChiCTR2100051729; https://www.chictr.org.cn/.
items.title_en: Adjunctive Methylprednisolone After Thrombectomy: A Secondary Analysis Stratified by Admission White Blood Cell Count.
items.title_cn: 血栓切除术后辅助甲基泼尼松龙：按入院白细胞计数分层的二次分析。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：白细胞驱动的炎症可能导致血栓切除术后再灌注结果不匹配。我们测试了入院白细胞（WBC）计数是否可以识别更有可能从辅助甲基泼尼松龙中获益的再灌注患者。方法：对 MARVEL 随机、安慰剂对照试验进行事后二次分析，并采用前瞻性最终统计分析计划。我们纳入了前循环大血管闭塞性卒中患者，他们在血栓切除术后成功实现再灌注，并接受静脉注射甲泼尼龙或安慰剂。该分析包括按入院白细胞计数分层的 1201 名患者（< 10 × 109/L，n = 808；≥ 10 × 109/L，n = 393）。主要结果是使用协变量调整序数逻辑回归的 90 天改良 Rankin 量表 (mRS 0-6)。次要结局包括 mRS 0-3 和 0-4、早期 NIHSS、死亡率、症状性颅内出血 (sICH)、任何颅内出血、肺炎和胃肠道出血。结果：治疗 × WBC 相互作用达到名义统计学显着性 (p = 0.04)。在 WBC ≥ 10 × 109/L 的患者中，甲基泼尼松龙与更有利的 90 天序数 mRS 分布相关（调整后的共同 OR，1.59；95% CI，1.11-2.28）、更高的 mRS 0-3 和 0-4 几率以及更低的死亡率（aOR，0.60；95% CI，0.37-0.96）和肺炎（aOR，0.61；95% CI，0.40-0.93），但出血或胃肠道出血没有明显增加。在 WBC < 10 × 109/L 的患者中没有观察到明显的益处。结论：较高的入院白细胞数与血栓切除术后辅助甲基泼尼松龙的更有利的估计治疗效果相关，值得前瞻性验证。试验注册：中国临床试验注册中心（ChiCTR.org.cn）；奇CTR2100051729； https://www.chictr.org.cn/。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Microglial mitochondria transfer to astrocytes via GPNMB-enriched extracellular vesicles alleviates cognitive deficits in tauopathy mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Chensi Liang; Yulan Zhou; Kai Zhuang; Shuzhong Wang; Li Zhong; Dan Can; Aiyu Lei; Huifang Li
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is an irreversible neurodegenerative disease characterized by cognitive decline. The precise molecular mechanisms that underlie the pathogenesis of AD remain elusive. Here we show that glycoprotein nonmetastatic melanoma protein B (GPNMB) is produced by microglia and transferred to astrocytes through extracellular vesicles (EVs) in PS19 tau pathology mice. Tau is cleaved in microglia to generate N-terminal fragments that form a complex on mitochondria with Parkin/Nix and GPNMB, promoting the secretion of EVs containing mitochondria. Functional mitochondria transferred to astrocytes via EVs markedly improve astrocytic functions and attenuate the cognitive impairments and pathogenic features in PS19 mice. By contrast, microglial GPNMB deficiency eliminates mitochondrial EV secretion and mitochondrial transfer to astrocytes, thereby impairing astrocytic functions and exacerbating cognitive impairment in PS19-CcKO (CX3CR1 cre Gpnmb floxp) mice. GPNMB-enriched EVs from PS19 mice alleviate the pathological phenotypes of PS19 mice, offering potential insights for AD treatment.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Microglial mitochondria transfer to astrocytes via GPNMB-enriched extracellular vesicles alleviates cognitive deficits in tauopathy mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 小胶质细胞线粒体通过富含 GPNMB 的细胞外囊泡转移至星形胶质细胞，可减轻 tau 蛋白病小鼠的认知缺陷。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是一种不可逆的神经退行性疾病，其特征是认知能力下降。 AD 发病机制的精确分子机制仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们表明，糖蛋白非转移性黑色素瘤蛋白 B (GPNMB) 由小胶质细胞产生，并通过 PS19 tau 病理小鼠的细胞外囊泡 (EV) 转移到星形胶质细胞。 Tau 在小胶质细胞中裂解，生成 N 末端片段，与 Parkin/Nix 和 GPNMB 在线粒体上形成复合物，促进含有线粒体的 EV 的分泌。通过 EV 转移到星形胶质细胞的功能性线粒体显着改善了 PS19 小鼠星形胶质细胞的功能并减轻了认知障碍和致病特征。相比之下，小胶质细胞 GPNMB 缺陷会消除线粒体 EV 分泌和线粒体向星形胶质细胞的转移，从而损害星形胶质细胞功能并加剧 PS19-CcKO (CX3CR1 cre Gpnmb floxp) 小鼠的认知障碍。来自 PS19 小鼠的富含 GPNMB 的 EV 减轻了 PS19 小鼠的病理表型，为 AD 治疗提供了潜在的见解。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Maternal-fetal type I interferon signaling drives TREM2 dysregulation and synaptic dysfunction in neurodevelopmental disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Matteo Bizzotto; Shih Feng You; Matteo Tamborini; Elisa Faggiani; Raffaella Morini; Antonella Borreca; Rui Zhang; Ekaterina Aladyeva
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Maternal infections during gestation cause perturbed neuroimmune interactions and increased risk of neurodevelopmental disorders in the offspring. Using a maternal immune activation model with polyinosinic:polycytidylic acid (poly(I:C)), we investigated how maternal infections reshape the progeny hippocampal landscape. Poly(I:C) increased maternal type I interferon (IFN-I), disrupting neuronal transcriptional trajectories and excitatory synapse homeostasis in juvenile offspring. Poly(I:C) offspring microglia exhibited reduced expression of triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2 (TREM2), a key regulator of synapse elimination and brain development, accompanied by impaired phagocytosis and suppressed IFN-I-responsive substate. Consistently, a blunted IFN-I signature was observed in postmortem tissues from schizophrenic patients. TREM2 deficiency was associated with aberrant maternal IFN-I and altered neuronal and microglial signatures in poly(I:C) offspring, highlighting its regulatory role in neurodevelopmental pathologies. Blocking maternal IFN-I signaling restored synaptic defects and TREM2 function, suggesting that monitoring IFN-I responses during pregnancy and targeting defective IFN-I cascades in the newborn may represent viable therapeutic approaches to mitigate neurodevelopmental dysfunctions.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Maternal-fetal type I interferon signaling drives TREM2 dysregulation and synaptic dysfunction in neurodevelopmental disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 母胎 I 型干扰素信号传导导致神经发育障碍中 TREM2 失调和突触功能障碍。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 妊娠期间的母体感染会扰乱神经免疫相互作用，并增加后代神经发育障碍的风险。使用聚肌苷酸：聚胞苷酸（poly（I：C））的母体免疫激活模型，我们研究了母体感染如何重塑子代海马景观。 Poly(I:C) 增加母体 I 型干扰素 (IFN-I)，破坏幼年后代的神经元转录轨迹和兴奋性突触稳态。 Poly(I:C) 后代小胶质细胞表现出髓系细胞 2 上表达的触发受体 (TREM2) 的表达减少，TREM2 是突触消除和大脑发育的关键调节因子，并伴有吞噬作用受损和 IFN-I 反应亚状态受到抑制。一致地，在精神分裂症患者的死后组织中观察到减弱的 IFN-I 特征。 TREM2 缺陷与异常的母体 IFN-I 以及 Poly(I:C) 后代中神经元和小胶质细胞特征的改变有关，突出了其在神经发育病理学中的调节作用。阻断母体 IFN-I 信号传导可恢复突触缺陷和 TREM2 功能，这表明在怀孕期间监测 IFN-I 反应并针对新生儿中缺陷的 IFN-I 级联可能代表减轻神经发育功能障碍的可行治疗方法。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Human haematopoietic stem cells remember inflammatory stress.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Andy G X Zeng; Murtaza S Nagree; Niels Asger Jakobsen; Sayyam Shah; Angelica Varesi; Jasmine Ryu Won Kang; Alex Murison; Jin-Gyu Cheong
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Inflammation activates blood cells, contributing to ageing and malignancy1-3. Haematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) survive a lifetime of infection to sustain life-long haematopoiesis1-9, but how human HSCs respond and adapt to inflammatory stress is largely unknown. Here, to empirically understand this adaptation, we developed xenograft inflammation-recovery models and performed single-cell multiomics on xenografted human HSCs. Two transcriptionally and epigenetically distinct HSC subsets were identified with one, termed HSC inflammatory memory (HSC-iM), retaining a molecular memory of previous inflammatory treatments. The HSC-iM subset exhibited quiescence and restrained haematopoietic output. Molecularly, the HSC-iM program was enriched in HSCs from adult and paediatric samples across conditions ranging from COVID-19 recovery, sickle cell disease, ageing and clonal haematopoiesis, establishing both the validity of our xenograft models and the physiological relevance of HSC-iM. Clonal haematopoiesis mutations in HSC-iM attenuated the effects of inflammatory stress by promoting HSC activation and differentiation. Moreover, transmission of the pro-inflammatory HSC-iM transcriptional program to differentiated immune progeny was demonstrated in xenograft and physiological settings. Finally, HSC-iM program enrichment in circulating blood cells was associated with a heightened risk score for all-cause mortality in population cohort analyses, underscoring the clinical relevance of this newly identified HSC subset in characterizing heterogeneous health outcomes across a lifetime.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Human haematopoietic stem cells remember inflammatory stress.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类造血干细胞会记住炎症应激。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 炎症会激活血细胞，导致衰老和恶性肿瘤1-3。造血干细胞 (HSC) 在感染后可存活终生，以维持终生造血功能1-9，但人类 HSC 如何响应和适应炎症应激尚不清楚。在这里，为了凭经验了解这种适应，我们开发了异种移植炎症恢复模型，并对异种移植的人类 HSC 进行了单细胞多组学研究。两个转录和表观遗传上不同的 HSC 亚群被鉴定出来，其中一个被称为 HSC 炎症记忆 (HSC-iM)，保留了先前炎症治疗的分子记忆。 HSC-iM 子集表现出静止和造血输出受限。从分子角度来看，HSC-iM 项目丰富了来自成人和儿童样本的 HSC，涵盖了从 COVID-19 恢复、镰状细胞病、衰老和克隆造血等各种条件，从而确立了我们异种移植模型的有效性和 HSC-iM 的生理相关性。 HSC-iM 的克隆造血突变通过促进 HSC 激活和分化来减弱炎症应激的影响。此外，在异种移植和生理环境中证实了促炎 HSC-iM 转录程序向分化免疫后代的传递。最后，HSC-iM 程序对循环血细胞的富集与人群队列分析中全因死亡率风险评分的升高相关，强调了这一新发现的 HSC 子集在描述一生中异质性健康结果方面的临床相关性。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Reevaluating the role of beta2-microglobulin: new insights on selective vulnerability in ALS pathology.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Melanie Leboeuf; Jik Nijssen; Laura Helen Comley; Julio Cesar Aguila Benitez; Irene Mei; Silvia Gómez Alcalde; Ramón A Muñoz de Bustillo-Alfaro; Vlad Radoi
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is characterized by the selective loss of motor neurons (MNs). Why these neurons are particularly vulnerable in ALS remains unclear, as does why certain MN groups remain resistant throughout the disease course. We investigated the role of the human leukocyte antigens (HLAs) and beta2-microglobulin (β2m) in MN susceptibility to ALS, given their reported involvement in both prolonging and shortening disease progression. Loss of HLAs in ALS has also been shown to increase MNs vulnerability to toxicity exerted by activated astrocytes. RNA sequencing of control tissues demonstrated that disease-resistant oculomotor neurons (OMNs) and Onuf's MNs exhibited β2m and HLA mRNA levels comparable to those of vulnerable spinal MNs, suggesting that baseline differences in these transcripts do not explain the differential vulnerabilities of these MN groups. However, HLA protein levels showed an inverse correlation with spinal MN size, with the large MNs, those lost early in ALS, displaying the lowest HLA expression. HLA protein levels were also reduced in spinal MNs from end-stage ALS patient tissues, while remaining relatively unchanged in OMNs. In contrast, spinal MNs uniquely exhibited significant upregulation of β2m and HLA-C transcripts during disease, likely reflecting a protective compensatory response. Together, these findings suggest that β2m and HLAs may contribute to spinal MN vulnerability in ALS. To assess their functional role, β2m knockout mice were crossbred with SOD1G93A ALS mice. Loss of β2m did not alter life span of the ALS mice, but led to partial preservation of lumbrical muscle innervation that was insufficient to maintain motor function. Analysis of GFAP immunoreactivity revealed marked neuroinflammation activation in the spinal cords of β2m knockout mice. As these mice retain normal MN numbers and life-span, this indicates that loss of functional MHC-I, even in the presence of astrocyte activation, is insufficient to cause MN disease. Furthermore, β2m knockout significantly increased GFAP activation in SOD1G93A mice, but did not further exacerbate disease progression, suggesting that loss of functional MHC-I does not necessarily render MNs more vulnerable to astrocyte toxicity. Overall, these findings indicate that β2m and HLAs are dynamically regulated in ALS, and may influence MN vulnerability, but they are not major disease modifiers in ALS.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Reevaluating the role of beta2-microglobulin: new insights on selective vulnerability in ALS pathology.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 重新评估 β2 微球蛋白的作用：关于 ALS 病理学选择性脆弱性的新见解。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）的特征是运动神经元（MN）的选择性丧失。为什么这些神经元在 ALS 中特别脆弱，以及为什么某些 MN 群体在整个病程中仍然具有抵抗力，尚不清楚。我们研究了人类白细胞抗原 (HLA) 和 β2 微球蛋白 (β2m) 在 MN 对 ALS 易感性中的作用，因为据报道它们与延长和缩短疾病进展有关。 ALS 中 HLA 的丢失也被证明会增加 MN 对激活的星形胶质细胞产生的毒性的脆弱性。对照组织的 RNA 测序表明，抗病动眼神经元 (OMN) 和 Onuf 的 MN 表现出与易受影响的脊髓 MN 相当的 β2m 和 HLA mRNA 水平，这表明这些转录本的基线差异并不能解释这些 MN 组的不同脆弱性。然而，HLA 蛋白水平与脊髓 MN 大小呈负相关，较大的 MN 在 ALS 早期丢失，HLA 表达最低。终末期 ALS 患者组织的脊髓 MN 中的 HLA 蛋白水平也有所降低，而 OMN 中的 HLA 蛋白水平保持相对不变。相比之下，脊髓 MN 在疾病期间独特地表现出 β2m 和 HLA-C 转录本的显着上调，这可能反映了保护性代偿反应。总之，这些发现表明 β2m 和 HLA 可能导致 ALS 中脊髓 MN 的脆弱性。为了评估其功能作用，将 β2m 敲除小鼠与 SOD1G93A ALS 小鼠杂交。 β2m 的缺失并没有改变 ALS 小鼠的寿命，但导致蚓状肌神经支配部分保留，不足以维持运动功能。 GFAP 免疫反应性分析揭示了 β2m 敲除小鼠脊髓中明显的神经炎症激活。由于这些小鼠保留了正常的 MN 数量和寿命，这表明功能性 MHC-I 的丧失，即使存在星形胶质细胞激活，也不足以引起 MN 疾病。此外，β2m 敲除显着增加了 SOD1G93A 小鼠中的 GFAP 激活，但并没有进一步加剧疾病进展，这表明功能性 MHC-I 的丧失不会导致疾病进展。……

核心发现：肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）的特征是运动神经元（MN）的选择性丧失。为什么这些神经元在 ALS 中特别脆弱，以及为什么某些 MN 群体在整个病程中仍然具有抵抗力，尚不清楚。我们研究了人类白细胞抗原 (HLA) 和 β2 微球蛋白 (β2m) 在 MN 对 ALS 易感性中的作用，因为据报道它们与延长和缩短疾病进展有关。 ALS 中 HLA 的丢失也被证明会增加 MN 对激活的星形胶质细胞产生的毒性的脆弱性。对照组织的 RNA 测序表明，抗病动眼神经元 (OMN) 和 Onuf 的 MN 表现出与易受影响的脊髓 MN 相当的 β2m 和 HLA mRNA 水平，这表明这些转录本的基线差异并不能解释这些 MN 组的不同脆弱性。然而，HLA 蛋白水平与脊髓 MN 大小呈负相关，较大的 MN 在 ALS 早期丢失，HLA 表达最低。终末期 ALS 患者组织的脊髓 MN 中的 HLA 蛋白水平也有所降低，而 OMN 中的 HLA 蛋白水平保持相对不变。相比之下，脊髓 MN 在疾病期间独特地表现出 β2m 和 HLA-C 转录本的显着上调，这可能反映了保护性代偿反应。总之，这些发现表明 β2m 和 HLA 可能导致 ALS 中脊髓 MN 的脆弱性。为了评估其功能作用，将 β2m 敲除小鼠与 SOD1G93A ALS 小鼠杂交。 β2m 的缺失并没有改变 ALS 小鼠的寿命，但导致蚓状肌神经支配部分保留，不足以维持运动功能。 GFAP 免疫反应性分析揭示了 β2m 敲除小鼠脊髓中明显的神经炎症激活。由于这些小鼠保留了正常的 MN 数量和寿命，这表明功能性 MHC-I 的丧失，即使存在星形胶质细胞激活，也不足以引起 MN 疾病。此外，β2m 敲除显着增加了 SOD1G93A 小鼠中的 GFAP 激活，但并没有进一步加剧疾病进展，这表明功能性 MHC-I 的丧失不会导致疾病进展。……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Standard-Dose Tenecteplase vs Low-Dose Alteplase for Acute Ischemic Stroke From Large-Vessel Occlusion: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Manabu Inoue; Teruyuki Hirano; Mayumi Fukuda-Doi; Hiroyuki Kawano; Kenta Tanaka; Nobuyuki Sakai; Masatoshi Koga; Koji Iwasaki
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Tenecteplase has advantages over standard-dose alteplase for acute ischemic stroke. A low-dose alteplase regimen (0.6 mg/kg) remains the standard in Japan and is commonly used in several Asian countries. OBJECTIVE: To determine whether standard-dose tenecteplase at 0.25 mg/kg achieves a higher rate of recanalization on the initial angiogram than low-dose alteplase at 0.6 mg/kg in patients scheduled for mechanical thrombectomy. It is inevitable to generate evidence required to support potential regulatory approval of tenecteplase in Japan. DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: This investigator-initiated, multicenter, randomized, controlled, open-label, superiority trial was conducted from August 19, 2022, through March 13, 2025, with 3-month follow-up and was the first ever to compare tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg) with alteplase (0.6 mg/kg) for acute ischemic stroke. Participants included patients with large-vessel-occlusion stroke eligible for intravenous thrombolysis within 4.5 hours of symptom onset followed by mechanical thrombectomy. A total of 221 patients were randomized and 218 who received trial drugs were included in the full analysis set (107 tenecteplase; 111 alteplase). These data were analyzed from July 2025 to December 2025. INTERVENTIONS: Patients were randomly assigned in a 1:1 ratio to receive either intravenous tenecteplase or alteplase. MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES: The primary outcome was substantial reperfusion (modified Treatment in Cerebral Ischemia grade 2b to 3 or no retrievable thrombus) on the initial angiogram. Secondary outcomes included the 90-day modified Rankin Scale. Safety outcomes were symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 24 to 36 hours and mortality at 90 days. RESULTS: A total of 218 patients (mean [SD] age, 77.1 [12.0] years; 92 female and 126 male) who received trial drugs were included in the full analysis set (107 tenecteplase; 111 alteplase). Substantial reperfusion occurred in 10.3% of the standard-dose tenecteplase group vs 3.6% of the low-dose alteplase group (absolute difference, 6.5 percentage points; 90% CI, 0.89-12.1), meeting the prespecified success criterion. The estimated common odds ratio for a shift toward better 90-day functional outcome with tenecteplase was 1.47 (95% CI, 0.92-2.35). Rates of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage (2.8% vs 1.8%) and mortality (6.5% vs 9.9%) were similar between tenecteplase and alteplase groups. CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: In this study, standard-dose tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg) prior to thrombectomy resulted in a higher rate of early substantial reperfusion compared with low-dose alteplase (0.6 mg/kg), with comparable functional and safety outcomes. Standard-dose tenecteplase is a promising thrombolytic option in regions where low-dose alteplase is currently the standard of care. TRIAL REGISTRATION: Japan Registry of Clinical Trials Identifier: 051210055.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Standard-Dose Tenecteplase vs Low-Dose Alteplase for Acute Ischemic Stroke From Large-Vessel Occlusion: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 标准剂量替奈普酶与低剂量阿替普酶治疗大血管闭塞引起的急性缺血性中风：随机临床试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 重要性：对于急性缺血性卒中，替奈普酶比标准剂量阿替普酶具有优势。低剂量阿替普酶治疗方案（0.6 mg/kg）仍然是日本的标准，并在几个亚洲国家普遍使用。目的：确定在计划进行机械血栓切除术的患者中，0.25 mg/kg 标准剂量替奈普酶是否比 0.6 mg/kg 低剂量阿替普酶在初始血管造影中实现更高的再通率。不可避免地需要产生支持替奈普酶在日本获得监管批准所需的证据。设计、环境和参与者：这项由研究者发起的、多中心、随机、对照、开放标签、优效性试验于 2022 年 8 月 19 日至 2025 年 3 月 13 日进行，随访期为 3 个月，是首次比较替奈普酶 (0.25 mg/kg) 与阿替普酶 (0.6 mg/kg) 治疗急性缺血性卒中的效果。参与者包括符合在症状出现 4.5 小时内进行静脉溶栓，然后进行机械血栓切除术的大血管闭塞性中风患者。共有 221 名患者被随机分组​​，218 名接受试验药物的患者被纳入完整分析组（107 名替奈普酶；111 名阿替普酶）。这些数据的分析时间为 2025 年 7 月至 2025 年 12 月。 干预：患者以 1:1 的比例随机分配接受静脉注射替奈普酶或阿替普酶。主要结果和测量：主要结果是初始血管造影的显着再灌注（2b 至 3 级脑缺血的改良治疗或无可恢复的血栓）。次要结果包括 90 天改良 Rankin 量表。安全性结果是 24 至 36 小时内出现症状性颅内出血，以及 90 天时死亡。结果：完整分析组中纳入了总共 218 名接受试验药物的患者（平均 [SD] 年龄，77.1 [12.0] 岁；92 名女性和 126 名男性）（107 名替奈普酶；111 名阿替普酶）。标准剂量替奈普酶组发生显着再灌注的比例为 10.3%，而低剂量阿替普酶组为 3.6%（绝对差异，6.5 个百分点；90% CI，0.89-12.1），满足预先设定的成功标准。轮班的估计共同优势比……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: MAGE-A4/MAGE-A8-targeted TCR-based bispecific T cell engager in recurrent and/or refractory solid tumors: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Martin Wermke; Sebastian Ochsenreither; Dirk Jaeger; Heiko Becker; Annalen Bleckmann; Farastuk Bozorgmehr; Manik Chatterjee; Stefanie Groepper
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMA401 is a T cell receptor (TCR)-based next-generation bispecific T cell engaging receptor (TCER) targeting an HLA-A*02:01-presented peptide derived from MAGE-A4/MAGE-A8 with its high-affinity TCR-based domain, incorporating a low-affinity T-cell-recruiting domain and an optimized Fc domain to prolong half-life. In this prespecified interim analysis of a phase 1 first-in-human trial, 61 patients with advanced solid tumors received intravenous IMA401 (0.0066 mg-2.5 mg) with or without pembrolizumab. The primary endpoint was determination of the maximum tolerated dose (MTD) and/or recommended phase 2 dose (RP2D) of IMA401 monotherapy and in combination with pembrolizumab. Secondary objectives included safety and tolerability, antitumor activity and pharmacokinetics. The MTD was not reached as defined by the clinical trial protocol, and the RP2D was 1-2 mg IMA401 biweekly. Treatment-related adverse events (TRAEs) were well manageable; the most common any-grade TRAEs were cytokine release syndrome (38%, grades 1-2 only), transient lymphopenia (33%) and reversible neutropenia (31%). Five patients experienced dose-limiting toxicity (DLT) events primarily related to neutropenia. No further DLTs occurred in the RP2D range with dexamethasone premedication. One possibly-related death (pneumonia in a patient with rapidly progressing lung metastases) was reported outside RP2D at 2.5 mg IMA401. In the overall efficacy-evaluable population across all dose levels (n = 56), including low starting doses (from 0.0066 mg), the confirmed objective response rate (ORR) was 14% (8/56). In patients receiving IMA401 at the RP2D, an ORR of 20% (8/41) was observed across 15 different indications (post hoc analysis). In the largest subgroup of patients treated at RP2D, namely head and neck cancer, the ORR was 29% (4/14) with a median duration of response of 8.8 months. These findings show that the bispecific TCER platform has a manageable safety profile with mostly transient adverse events and promising antitumor activity at the RP2D of IMA401 with or without pembrolizumab. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT05359445 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: MAGE-A4/MAGE-A8-targeted TCR-based bispecific T cell engager in recurrent and/or refractory solid tumors: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: MAGE-A4/MAGE-A8 靶向基于 TCR 的双特异性 T 细胞参与复发性和/或难治性实体瘤：一项 1 期试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: IMA401 是一种基于 T 细胞受体 (TCR) 的下一代双特异性 T 细胞接合受体 (TCER)，靶向源自 MAGE-A4/MAGE-A8 的 HLA-A*02:01 呈递肽，具有基于 TCR 的高亲和力结构域，结合低亲和力 T 细胞招募结构域和优化的 Fc 结构域以延长半衰期。在这项 1 期首次人体试验的预先指定的中期分析中，61 名晚期实体瘤患者接受静脉注射 IMA401（0.0066 mg-2.5 mg），联合或不联合派姆单抗。主要终点是确定 IMA401 单药治疗以及与派姆单抗联合治疗的最大耐受剂量 (MTD) 和/或推荐 2 期剂量 (RP2D)。次要目标包括安全性和耐受性、抗肿瘤活性和药代动力学。未达到临床试验方案定义的 MTD，RP2D 为每两周 1-2 mg IMA401。治疗相关不良事件（TRAE）易于控制；最常见的任何级别的 TRAE 是细胞因子释放综合征（38%，仅限 1-2 级）、短暂性淋巴细胞减少症（33%）和可逆性中性粒细胞减少症（31%）。五名患者经历了主要与中性粒细胞减少症相关的剂量限制性毒性（DLT）事件。术前使用地塞米松后，在 RP2D 范围内没有发生进一步的 DLT。在 2.5 mg IMA401 的 RP2D 之外，报告了 1 例可能相关的死亡（肺转移迅速进展的患者发生肺炎）。在所有剂量水平（n = 56）的总体疗效可评估人群中，包括低起始剂量（0.0066 mg 起），确认的客观缓解率 (ORR) 为 14% (8/56)。在 RP2D 接受 IMA401 的患者中，在 15 种不同的适应症中观察到 ORR 为 20% (8/41)（事后分析）。在接受 RP2D 治疗的最大患者亚组（即头颈癌）中，ORR 为 29% (4/14)，中位缓解持续时间为 8.8 个月。这些研究结果表明，双特异性 TCER 平台具有可控的安全性，大多数是短暂的不良事件，并且无论有或没有派姆单抗，IMA401 的 RP2D 都具有良好的抗肿瘤活性。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT05359445。

核心发现：IMA401 是一种基于 T 细胞受体 (TCR) 的下一代双特异性 T 细胞接合受体 (TCER)，靶向源自 MAGE-A4/MAGE-A8 的 HLA-A*02:01 呈递肽，具有基于 TCR 的高亲和力结构域，结合低亲和力 T 细胞招募结构域和优化的 Fc 结构域以延长半衰期。在这项 1 期首次人体试验的预先指定的中期分析中，61 名晚期实体瘤患者接受静脉注射 IMA401（0.0066 mg-2.5 mg），联合或不联合派姆单抗。主要终点是确定 IMA401 单药治疗以及与派姆单抗联合治疗的最大耐受剂量 (MTD) 和/或推荐 2 期剂量 (RP2D)。次要目标包括安全性和耐受性、抗肿瘤活性和药代动力学。未达到临床试验方案定义的 MTD，RP2D 为每两周 1-2 mg IMA401。治疗相关不良事件（TRAE）易于控制；最常见的任何级别的 TRAE 是细胞因子释放综合征（38%，仅限 1-2 级）、短暂性淋巴细胞减少症（33%）和可逆性中性粒细胞减少症（31%）。五名患者经历了主要与中性粒细胞减少症相关的剂量限制性毒性（DLT）事件。术前使用地塞米松后，在 RP2D 范围内没有发生进一步的 DLT。在 2.5 mg IMA401 的 RP2D 之外，报告了 1 例可能相关的死亡（肺转移迅速进展的患者发生肺炎）。在所有剂量水平（n = 56）的总体疗效可评估人群中，包括低起始剂量（0.0066 mg 起），确认的客观缓解率 (ORR) 为 14% (8/56)。在 RP2D 接受 IMA401 的患者中，在 15 种不同的适应症中观察到 ORR 为 20% (8/41)（事后分析）。在接受 RP2D 治疗的最大患者亚组（即头颈癌）中，ORR 为 29% (4/14)，中位缓解持续时间为 8.8 个月。这些研究结果表明，双特异性 TCER 平台具有可控的安全性，大多数是短暂的不良事件，并且无论有或没有派姆单抗，IMA401 的 RP2D 都具有良好的抗肿瘤活性。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT05359445。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Clinical markers of disease progression in the prodromal to overt alpha-synucleinopathy continuum.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Monica Roascio; Elena Antelmi; Luca Baldelli; Francesco Biscarini; Enrica Bonanni; Valerio Brunetti; Elena Capriglia; Claudio Geromino
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Clinical progression from prodromal to overt stages of alpha-synucleinopathies is highly heterogeneous, and there is an urgent need for reliable clinical progression markers. Exploiting the Disease Course Map (DCM) model, we investigated how clinical signs evolve in patients with idiopathic/isolated rapid-eye-movement sleep behavior disorder (iRBD), extracting clinical progression measures for use at the single-subject level. Furthermore, we correlated them with both established and innovative neurodegeneration biomarkers. We trained a DCM model using cognitive and motor scores of a longitudinal cohort of 766 iRBD patients (166 female, 67.9 ± 7.4 years). We personalized the model by extracting three parameters to describe the single subject in comparison to the averaged population data. We tested the model on a blind set of 49 iRBD patients (7 female, 68.5 ± 7.1 years) who underwent both longitudinal clinical evaluations and instrumental evaluation at the first observation. In the blind set, we correlated the individual model parameters with presynaptic dopaminergic impairment, an established biomarker of substantia nigra neurodegeneration, and cortical electrophysiological dysfunction-measured by high-density electroencephalography (HD-EEG)-an innovative neurodegeneration biomarker. We identified three individual clinical markers reflecting early/late (time shift, τ) and fast/slow (acceleration factor, α) disease progression, as well as the individual clinical trajectory (i.e., earlier motor or cognitive impairment, intermarker spacing, ω). The individual model parameters are significantly associated with phenoconversion, with a 73% chance of distinguishing between clinically stable patients (non-converters) and those converting during the longitudinal observation to an overt alpha-synucleinopathy (converters). Motor scores progress 35% faster than cognitive scores in our iRBD cohort. Converter iRBD patients exhibited a faster and earlier disease progression than non-converters, and, on average, they showed an earlier worsening of motor scores than cognitive scores, regardless of the clinical diagnosis of overt parkinsonism. Patients with iRBD who developed parkinsonism worsened earlier than those who develop dementia. At baseline, an earlier progression was related to presynaptic dopaminergic impairment and higher phase synchronization in the theta band (4-8 Hz). Higher synchronization in the theta band was also associated with an earlier worsening of motor scores than cognitive scores. In this study, we investigated a large longitudinal iRBD cohort, applying an advanced disease progression model. We found three individual clinical markers that were able to monitor disease progression and showed significant association with both established and innovative neurodegeneration biomarkers. We suggest that these clinical markers could be used as efficacy endpoints in disease-modifying clinical trials.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Clinical markers of disease progression in the prodromal to overt alpha-synucleinopathy continuum.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 从前驱期到明显的α-突触核蛋白病连续体中疾病进展的临床标志物。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: α-突触核蛋白病从前驱期到显性阶段的临床进展具有高度异质性，迫切需要可靠的临床进展标志物。利用疾病病程图 (DCM) 模型，我们研究了特发性/孤立性快速动眼睡眠行为障碍 (iRBD) 患者的临床症状如何演变，提取了用于单个受试者水平的临床进展指标。此外，我们将它们与已建立的和创新的神经变性生物标志物相关联。我们使用 766 名 iRBD 患者（166 名女性，67.9 ± 7.4 岁）纵向队列的认知和运动评分来训练 DCM 模型。我们通过提取三个参数来描述单个受试者与平均人口数据的比较来个性化模型。我们在 49 名 iRBD 患者（7 名女性，68.5 ± 7.1 岁）中进行了盲法测试，这些患者在第一次观察时接受了纵向临床评估和仪器评估。在盲组中，我们将各个模型参数与突触前多巴胺能损伤（黑质神经变性的一种既定生物标志物）和皮质电生理功能障碍（通过高密度脑电图（HD-EEG）测量）（一种创新的神经变性生物标志物）相关联。我们确定了三个反映早期/晚期（时移，τ）和快/慢（加速因子，α）疾病进展的个体临床标记，以及个体临床轨迹（即早期运动或认知障碍、标记间间距，ω）。各个模型参数与表型转化显着相关，有 73% 的机会区分临床稳定的患者（非转化者）和在纵向观察期间转化为明显的 α-突触核蛋白病的患者（转化者）。在我们的 iRBD 队列中，运动分数的进步比认知分数的进步快 35%。与未转化的 iRBD 患者相比，转化的 iRBD 患者表现出更快、更早的疾病进展，并且平均而言，无论明显的帕金森病的临床诊断如何，他们的运动评分比认知评分更早恶化。患有 iRBD 的患者发展水平……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Idiopathic Intracranial Hypertension Is Characterized by a Distinct Proteomic Profile.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Santosh D Bhosale; Arkadiusz Nawrocki; Johanne J Korsbæk; Nadja S Hansen; Fabian Foettinger; Nik Krajnc; Mathias J Norvig; Niclas L Eriksen
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: OBJECTIVES: The pathophysiology of idiopathic intracranial hypertension (IIH) is poorly understood and disease-specific biomarkers are lacking. We aimed to shed light on IIH pathophysiology and identify disease-specific biomarkers. METHODS: This prospective cross-sectional cohort study included patients with new-onset IIH and age-, body mass index-, and sex-matched healthy controls from 2 tertiary Danish Headache Centers (discovery cohort). Liquid chromatography coupled to tandem mass spectrometry analysis was used to measure reproducible proteomic profiles for paired serum and cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) samples. Results were validated using 3 validation cohorts comprising patients with IIH (pwIIH), cerebral sinus venous thrombosis (pwCSVT), and normal pressure hydrocephalus (pwNPH). RESULTS: We included 53 pwIIH and 35 controls. PwIIH presented with papilledema and increased median lumbar puncture opening pressure (interquartile range [IQR]) (38.0 [33-46] vs 19.0 [17.0-23.0] cmH2O; p < 0.001) compared to controls. Machine learning analysis identified 20 IIH-predicting proteins for serum and CSF segregating pwIIH, but neither pwCSVT nor pwNPH, from controls with areas under the curve (AUC) of 0.84 and 0.92 (pwIIH, discovery cohort), 0.99 and 0.90 (pwIIH, validation cohort 1), 0.63 (plasma; pwCSVT), and 0.67 (CSF; pwNPH), respectively. Serum carbonic anhydrases (CA) 1 and 2 were upregulated and among the most IIH-predicting proteins as were amyloid precursor protein (APP), S100P, and S100A12. INTERPRETATION: We identified a panel of independently validated IIH-specific candidate biomarkers. The serum candidate biomarkers pointed toward CA2 driven CSF hypersecretion in IIH providing a possible explanation for the therapeutic efficacy of CA inhibitors. The regulation of markers associated with neuronal impairment (APP, S100P/S100A12) confirmed the non-benign character of IIH. ANN NEUROL 2026.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Idiopathic Intracranial Hypertension Is Characterized by a Distinct Proteomic Profile.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 特发性颅内高压的特点是具有独特的蛋白质组学特征。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 目的：对特发性颅内高压（IIH）的病理生理学了解甚少，并且缺乏疾病特异性生物标志物。我们的目的是阐明 IIH 病理生理学并确定疾病特异性生物标志物。方法：这项前瞻性横断面队列研究包括来自 2 个丹麦三级头痛中心的新发 IIH 患者以及年龄、体重指数和性别匹配的健康对照（发现队列）。液相色谱与串联质谱分析相结合，用于测量配对血清和脑脊液 (CSF) 样品的可重复蛋白质组谱。结果使用 3 个验证队列进行验证，其中包括 IIH (pwIIH)、脑窦静脉血栓形成 (pwCSVT) 和正常压力脑积水 (pwNPH) 患者。结果：我们纳入了 53 名 pwIIH 和 35 名对照。与对照组相比，PwIIH 表现为视乳头水肿和中位腰椎穿刺开放压（四分位距 [IQR]）增加（38.0 [33-46] vs 19.0 [17.0-23.0] cmH2O；p < 0.001）。机器学习分析从曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.84 和 0.92（pwIIH，发现队列）、0.99 和 0.90（pwIIH，验证队列 1）、0.63（血浆；pwCSVT）和 0.99 和 0.90（pwIIH，验证队列 1）的对照组中识别出 20 种用于血清和脑脊液的 IIH 预测蛋白，但 pwCSVT 和 pwNPH 均不分离。分别为 0.67（CSF；pwNPH）。血清碳酸酐酶 (CA) 1 和 2 上调，淀粉样前体蛋白 (APP)、S100P 和 S100A12 属于最能预测 IIH 的蛋白质。解释：我们确定了一组独立验证的 IIH 特异性候选生物标志物。血清候选生物标志物表明 IIH 中 CA2 驱动的脑脊液分泌过多，为 CA 抑制剂的治疗效果提供了可能的解释。与神经元损伤相关的标志物（APP、S100P/S100A12）的调节证实了 IIH 的非良性特征。安神经学 2026。

global_hot_topics.title: Microbiome functional gene pathways are indicative of cognitive performance in older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease.
global_hot_topics.authors: Abigail L Zeamer; YuShuan Lai; Ethan Loew; Victoria Sanborn; Matthew Tracy; Cynthia Jo; Danielle Ferdinand; Doyle V Ward
global_hot_topics.abstract: Disturbances in the gut microbiome are increasingly correlated with neurodegenerative disorders, including Alzheimer's disease. Multiple lines of emerging evidence are consistent with the microbiome's involvement in disease pathology in AD by triggering or potentiating systemic and neuroinflammation, thereby influencing disease pathology through the "microbiota-gut-brain axis." Currently, the copathologies contributing to cognitive decline and symptomatic progression in AD remain unknown and understudied. Changes in the gut microbiome composition may offer clues to potential systemic physiologic and neuropathologic changes that contribute to cognitive decline. Here, we recruited a cohort of 260 older adults (aged 60 y or older) living in the community and followed them over time, tracking objective measures of cognition, clinical information, and gut microbiome samples. Subjects were classified as healthy controls, exhibiting mild cognitive impairment, or having dementia based on clinical assessments. Using metagenomic sequencing and gene pathway analyses, we found that certain microbial-encoded metabolic pathways correlated with worse cognitive performance. Specifically, genes involved in the urea cycle, polyamine synthesis, or the metabolism of methionine and cysteine predicted worse cognitive performance. Our study suggests that the gut microbiome composition may be linked to cognitive impairment along the AD continuum and points to microbial metabolic pathways that may potentiate disease.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Microbiome functional gene pathways are indicative of cognitive performance in older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 微生物组功能基因通路表明有阿尔茨海默病风险的老年人的认知表现。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 肠道微生物组的紊乱与神经退行性疾病（包括阿尔茨海默病）的相关性越来越大。多种新出现的证据表明，微生物组通过触发或增强全身和神经炎症，从而参与 AD 疾病病理学，从而通过“微生物群-肠-脑轴”影响疾病病理学。目前，导致 AD 认知能力下降和症状进展的共同病理学仍然未知且研究不足。肠道微生物组组成的变化可能为导致认知能力下降的潜在全身生理和神经病理变化提供线索。在这里，我们招募了 260 名生活在社区的老年人（60 岁或以上），并对他们进行长期跟踪，跟踪认知、临床信息和肠道微生物组样本的客观测量。根据临床评估，受试者被分类为健康对照、表现出轻度认知障碍或患有痴呆症。通过宏基因组测序和基因通路分析，我们发现某些微生物编码的代谢通路与较差的认知表现相关。具体来说，参与尿素循环、多胺合成或蛋氨酸和半胱氨酸代谢的基因预测认知能力较差。我们的研究表明，肠道微生物组的组成可能与 AD 连续体的认知障碍有关，并指出可能加剧疾病的微生物代谢途径。

global_hot_topics.title: Oxidative stress biomarkers and flavonoids in Alzheimer's disease: current clinical evidence and therapeutic perspectives.
global_hot_topics.journal: Redox report : communications in free radical research
global_hot_topics.authors: Muhammad-Safuan Zainuddin; Narendra Pamidi; Adzzie Shazleen Azman; Kasthuri Bai Magalingam; Saatheeyavaane Bhuvanendran
global_hot_topics.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a major global neurodegenerative disorder associated with high morbidity and mortality, yet current treatments remain largely symptomatic and ineffective in halting neurodegeneration. Growing evidence links oxidative stress potentially being an early event in AD progression. Consequently, therapeutic strategies targeting oxidative stress-mediated cellular damage are increasingly attractive. This review summarizes clinical evidence of oxidative stress biomarkers in AD and examines the neuroprotective mechanisms of flavonoids against oxidative stress in vivo, together with current clinical findings. Despite inconsistencies among studies due to variations in detection methods, a consistent trend of elevated oxidative stress in AD is evident, correlating with disease severity. Although in vivo studies have demonstrated that flavonoids restore antioxidant defences and suppress neuroinflammation, convincing clinical evidence of their efficacy in AD patients remains limited. Overall, these findings emphasize oxidative stress as a therapeutic target requiring further validation efforts.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Oxidative stress biomarkers and flavonoids in Alzheimer's disease: current clinical evidence and therapeutic perspectives.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 阿尔茨海默病中的氧化应激生物标志物和黄酮类化合物：当前的临床证据和治疗观点。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是一种主要的全球性神经退行性疾病，发病率和死亡率很高，但目前的治疗方法仍然主要是针对症状的，并且在阻止神经退行性方面无效。越来越多的证据表明氧化应激可能是 AD 进展的早期事件。因此，针对氧化应激介导的细胞损伤的治疗策略越来越有吸引力。本综述总结了 AD 中氧化应激生物标志物的临床证据，并研究了黄酮类化合物对抗体内氧化应激的神经保护机制，以及当前的临床发现。尽管由于检测方法的不同，研究之间存在不一致，但 AD 中氧化应激升高的一致趋势是明显的，与疾病严重程度相关。尽管体内研究表明类黄酮可以恢复抗氧化防御并抑制神经炎症，但令人信服的临床证据表明其对 AD 患者的功效仍然有限。总的来说，这些发现强调氧化应激作为治疗目标需要进一步的验证工作。

global_hot_topics.title: Integrative transcriptomic analysis unveils FXR as a key regulator of intestinal stemness and inflammation in ulcerative colitis.
global_hot_topics.authors: Hao Lin; Xinran Cheng; Yangyang Ren; Yongmei Zhang; Weixu Chen; Qingyan Lu; Yiqing Tian
global_hot_topics.abstract: High‑throughput transcriptomic technologies offer a systems‑level approach to unravel the mechanisms of complex immune disorders. Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD), a classic example of such disorders, involves intricate interactions between genetics, microbiota and immune dysfunction. The nuclear receptor farnesoid X receptor (FXR) is implicated in IBD, but its precise mechanisms remain unclear. To investigate the role of FXR in ulcerative colitis (UC), the present study employed an integrative transcriptomic strategy, combining bulk transcriptomics (GSE75214, GSE13367 and GSE87466) and single‑cell RNA‑sequencing data (GSE116222) of human UC samples obtained from the Gene Expression Omnibus database. Subsequently, these findings were validated in a dextran sulfate sodium‑induced colitis model using FXR global knockout mice. The results revealed that FXR expression is downregulated in UC and co‑localizes with the stem cell marker CD133 in intestinal crypts. FXR deficiency exacerbated dextran sulfate sodium‑induced colitis, impaired the expression of stemness‑associated transcription factors (octamer‑binding transcription factor 3/4, homeobox protein NANOG, transcription factor SOX2 and Sal‑like protein 4), and activated the NF‑κB pathway, leading to increased production of pro‑inflammatory cytokines, specifically TNF‑α and IL‑1β. By integrating bulk and single‑cell transcriptomics with genetic validation, the present study uncovered an FXR‑dependent mechanism linking intestinal stem cell dysfunction to NF‑κB‑driven inflammation in colitis, and established a generalizable multi‑layer transcriptomic dissection strategy for complex inflammatory disorders.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Integrative transcriptomic analysis unveils FXR as a key regulator of intestinal stemness and inflammation in ulcerative colitis.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 综合转录组分析揭示 FXR 是溃疡性结肠炎肠道干性和炎症的关键调节因子。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 高通量转录组技术提供了一种系统级方法来揭示复杂免疫疾病的机制。炎症性肠病（IBD）是此类疾病的一个典型例子，涉及遗传学、微生物群和免疫功能障碍之间复杂的相互作用。核受体法尼醇 X 受体 (FXR) 与 IBD 有关，但其确切机制仍不清楚。为了研究 FXR 在溃疡性结肠炎 (UC) 中的作用，本研究采用了综合转录组学策略，结合了从基因表达综合数据库获得的人类 UC 样本的批量转录组学（GSE75214、GSE13367 和 GSE87466）和单细胞 RNA 测序数据 (GSE116222)。随后，这些发现在使用 FXR 全基因敲除小鼠的葡聚糖硫酸钠诱导的结肠炎模型中得到了验证。结果显示，FXR 表达在 UC 中下调，并与肠隐窝中的干细胞标记 CD133 共定位。 FXR 缺乏会加剧葡聚糖硫酸钠诱导的结肠炎，损害干性相关转录因子（八聚体结合转录因子 3/4、同源框蛋白 NANOG、转录因子 SOX2 和 Sal 样蛋白 4）的表达，并激活 NF-κB 通路，导致促炎细胞因子（特别是 TNF-α 和 IL-1β）的产生增加。通过将大量和单细胞转录组学与遗传验证相结合，本研究发现了一种 FXR 依赖性机制，将肠道干细胞功能障碍与结肠炎中 NF-κB 驱动的炎症联系起来，并建立了针对复杂炎症性疾病的通用多层转录组解剖策略。

global_hot_topics.title: Epigenetic orchestration of scar formation: Therapeutic potential of targeting DNA methylation and non‑coding RNAs in cutaneous fibrosis (Review).
global_hot_topics.authors: Jinshun Li; Weiyun Liu; Jin Yang; Yanan Li
global_hot_topics.abstract: Cutaneous fibrosis is sustained by epigenetic 'memory' rather than chronic inflammation. DNA hypermethylation, repressive histone marks and non‑coding RNA networks lock dermal fibroblasts into a collagen‑secretory state that can persist years after wounding. Single‑cell methylomes have identified DNA methyltransferase (DNMT)3B as the key epigenetic writer driving anti‑fibrotic gene silencing, whereas N6‑methyladenosine‑modified long non‑coding RNAs and reinforce these loops by tethering methylation machinery to chromatin. Local delivery of DNMT inhibitors, microRNA‑29 mimics or antisense oligonucleotides via dissolvable microneedles, metal‑organic framework patches or exosome arrays reproducibly reduces scar volume by 25‑55% in pre‑clinical models without systemic exposure of therapeutic agents. The present review integrates multi‑omic mechanistic data with emerging device platforms to chart a precision roadmap for converting scar‑forming repair into scar‑sparing regeneration.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Epigenetic orchestration of scar formation: Therapeutic potential of targeting DNA methylation and non‑coding RNAs in cutaneous fibrosis (Review).
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 疤痕形成的表观遗传协调：针对皮肤纤维化的 DNA 甲基化和非编码 RNA 的治疗潜力（综述）。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 皮肤纤维化是由表观遗传“记忆”而不是慢性炎症维持的。 DNA 高甲基化、抑制性组蛋白标记和非编码 RNA 网络将真皮成纤维细胞锁定在胶原蛋白分泌状态，这种状态可以在受伤后持续数年。单细胞甲基化组已将 DNA 甲基转移酶 (DNMT)3B 确定为驱动抗纤维化基因沉默的关键表观遗传写入酶，而 N6 甲基腺苷修饰的长非编码 RNA 并通过将甲基化机制束缚在染色质上来强化这些环。在临床前模型中，通过可溶性微针、金属有机框架贴片或外泌体阵列局部递送 DNMT 抑制剂、microRNA-29 模拟物或反义寡核苷酸，可重复地将疤痕体积减少 25-55%，而无需全身暴露治疗药物。本综述将多组学机制数据与新兴设备平台相结合，绘制出将疤痕形成修复转化为疤痕保留再生的精确路线图。

global_hot_topics.title: Elucidating the multitarget neuroprotective mechanisms of protocatechuic acid in neurological disorders (Review).
global_hot_topics.authors: Xiaoyan Xue; Yongchang Lai; Shasha Song; Liping Wu; Lifang Wang
global_hot_topics.abstract: Neurological disorders such as Alzheimer's disease (AD), Parkinson's disease (PD), cerebral ischemia, anxiety and depression pose significant global public health challenges due to their high prevalence and complex pathological mechanisms. Current therapeutic strategies primarily offer symptomatic relief, with limited efficacy in mitigating disease progression. Neuroprotection involves interventions aimed at preserving neuronal structure and function through mechanisms such as reducing oxidative stress, modulating inflammation and inhibiting apoptosis, presenting a promising avenue for treating these conditions. Protocatechuic acid (PCA), a natural phenolic acid compound prevalent in a variety of foods and herbal medicines, has received considerable attention for its notable antioxidant, anti‑inflammatory and neuroprotective properties. The present study systematically reviews the neuroprotective effects and molecular mechanisms of PCA in various neurological disorders (including AD, PD and cerebral ischemia). The present review highlights the multi‑target mechanisms of PCA, which act by mitigating oxidative stress, neuroinflammation, mitochondrial dysfunction and apoptosis, while promoting neuronal regeneration. Furthermore, the present review integrates the body of evidence across neurological contexts to identify conserved protective pathways and discusses the translational potential of PCA, providing a foundation for its clinical application in treating neurological diseases.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Elucidating the multitarget neuroprotective mechanisms of protocatechuic acid in neurological disorders (Review).
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 阐明原儿茶酸在神经系统疾病中的多靶点神经保护机制（综述）。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）、帕金森病（PD）、脑缺血、焦虑和抑郁等神经系统疾病因其高患病率和复杂的病理机制而对全球公共卫生构成重大挑战。目前的治疗策略主要是缓解症状，但减缓疾病进展的功效有限。神经保护涉及旨在通过减少氧化应激、调节炎症和抑制细胞凋亡等机制保护神经元结构和功能的干预措施，为治疗这些疾病提供了一条有前途的途径。原儿茶酸 (PCA) 是一种天然酚酸化合物，广泛存在于各种食品和草药中，因其显着的抗氧化、抗炎和神经保护特性而受到广泛关注。本研究系统综述了PCA在各种神经系统疾病（包括AD、PD和脑缺血）中的神经保护作用和分子机制。本综述强调了 PCA 的多靶点机制，其通过减轻氧化应激、神经炎症、线粒体功能障碍和细胞凋亡来发挥作用，同时促进神经元再生。此外，本综述整合了神经系统背景下的大量证据，以确定保守的保护途径，并讨论了 PCA 的转化潜力，为其治疗神经系统疾病的临床应用奠定了基础。

global_hot_topics.title: 12‑weeks fisetin supplementation and interval resistance with aerobic training: changes in Maresin‑1 and inflammatory markers in men with obesity: a randomized controlled trial.
global_hot_topics.journal: Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition
global_hot_topics.authors: Mehran Alipour; Ayoub Saeidi; Keyvan Hejazi; Ismail Laher; Hassane Zouhal
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Obesity is characterized by low‑grade chronic inflammation and impaired insulin sensitivity. Maresin‑1 (MaR1), a specialized pro‑resolving mediator, plays a critical role in terminating inflammation and supporting metabolic homeostasis; however, interventional data in humans remain scarce. This study examined whether fisetin supplementation augments the effects of concurrent interval resistance-aerobic training on Maresin‑1, pro‑inflammatory markers, and insulin resistance in obese men. METHODS: In a 12‑week parallel‑group randomized controlled trial, 44 obese adult males (BMI > 30 kg/m²) completed one of four interventions: control-placebo (CP), fisetin (F) (200 mg/day), training-placebo (TP), or training-fisetin (TF). Training comprised eight resistance exercises at 60% 1RM with active rest followed by progressive aerobic bouts (50%-70% HRmax). Anthropometric and biochemical parameters, including plasma Maresin‑1, interleukin-6 (IL‑6), tumor necrosis factor-alpha (TNF‑α), fasting blood glucose (FBS), insulin, and HOMA‑IR, were assessed pre‑ and post‑intervention. RESULTS: Significant group × time interactions were observed for Maresin‑1 (p = 0.034), IL‑6 (p = 0.001), TNF‑α (p = 0.001), FBS (p = 0.001), insulin (p = 0.001), and HOMA‑IR (p = 0.001). Maresin‑1 increased in the TP (p = 0.001) and TF (p = 0.001) groups. IL‑6 decreased in T (p = 0.006), TF (p = 0.001), and F (p = 0.013) groups. TNF‑α decreased in all intervention groups (F, TP, and TF) (p = 0.002). FBS, insulin, and HOMA‑IR decreased significantly in all active arms (p = 0.003), with the greatest reductions in the TF group. CONCLUSION: Twelve weeks of concurrent interval resistance-aerobic training, especially when combined with fisetin, improved inflammatory resolution (↑Maresin‑1, ↓IL‑6, and ↓TNF‑α) and metabolic control (↓FBS, ↓insulin, and ↓HOMA‑IR) in obese men. The synergy between exercise‑induced adaptations and fisetin's anti‑inflammatory properties offers a promising non‑pharmacological strategy for mitigating obesity‑related metabolic risk.

global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：肥胖的特点是低度慢性炎症和胰岛素敏感性受损。 Maresin-1 (MaR1) 是一种专门的促消退介质，在终止炎症和支持代谢稳态方面发挥着关键作用；然而，人类的介入数据仍然很少。这项研究检验了补充非瑟酮是否会增强肥胖男性同时进行的间歇抗阻有氧训练对 Maresin-1、促炎标志物和胰岛素抵抗的影响。方法：在一项为期 12 周的平行组随机对照试验中，44 名肥胖成年男性（BMI > 30 kg/m²）完成了四种干预措施之一：对照安慰剂 (CP)、非瑟酮 (F)（200 毫克/天）、训练安慰剂 (TP) 或训练非瑟酮 (TF)。训练包括八次 60% 1RM 的阻力练习，积极休息，然后进行渐进式有氧运动（50%-70% HRmax）。在干预前和干预后评估了人体测量和生化参数，包括血浆 Maresin-1、白介素-6 (IL-6)、肿瘤坏死因子-α (TNF-α)、空腹血糖 (FBS)、胰岛素和 HOMA-IR。结果：Maresin-1 (p = 0.034)、IL-6 (p = 0.001)、TNF-α (p = 0.001)、FBS (p = 0.001)、胰岛素 (p = 0.001) 和 HOMA-IR (p = 0.001) 观察到显着的组 × 时间相互作用。 Maresin-1 在 TP (p = 0.001) 和 TF (p = 0.001) 组中增加。 T (p = 0.006)、TF (p = 0.001) 和 F (p = 0.013) 组中 IL-6 下降。所有干预组（F、TP 和 TF）中 TNF-α 均下降 (p = 0.002)。所有活跃组中的 FBS、胰岛素和 HOMA-IR 均显着下降 (p = 0.003)，其中 TF 组下降幅度最大。结论：12 周的同步间歇抗阻有氧训练，尤其是与非瑟酮结合使用时，可改善肥胖男性的炎症消退（↑Maresin-1、↓IL-6 和 ↓TNF-α）和代谢控制（↓FBS、↓胰岛素和 ↓HOMA-IR）。运动引起的适应与非瑟酮的抗炎特性之间的协同作用为减轻肥胖相关的代谢风险提供了一种有前景的非药物策略。

global_hot_topics.title: Nanomedicine-based cancer immunotherapy: translational barriers, mechanistic strategies, and future perspectives.
global_hot_topics.authors: Xiaoman Suo; Yingnan Liu; Guofang Zhang; Yang Li
global_hot_topics.abstract: Nanomedicine-based cancer immunotherapy integrates nanotechnology with immune modulation, representing a promising strategy to improve both the efficacy and safety of cancer treatment. Despite substantial preclinical potential, clinical translation is hindered by interconnected challenges in pharmacology, pharmacodynamics, and long-term safety. This mechanism-oriented prospective analyzes translational bottlenecks, pharmacological uncertainty from biomolecular corona, suboptimal pharmacodynamics due to tumor barriers, and metabolism/excretion affecting biosafety. Using a concept-driven framework, we link nano-bio interactions to clinical outcomes within a 'barrier-strategy' paradigm. Corresponding strategies such as mechanism-driven design, AI-assisted optimization, and advanced delivery systems are discussed, with emphasis on safety-by-design principles. Collectively, this perspective provides a forward-looking roadmap for future research, underscoring the importance of integrated technologies, advanced translational models, and scalable manufacturing to fully realize the clinical potential of nanoimmunotherapy.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Nanomedicine-based cancer immunotherapy: translational barriers, mechanistic strategies, and future perspectives.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 基于纳米医学的癌症免疫疗法：转化障碍、机制策略和未来前景。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 基于纳米医学的癌症免疫疗法将纳米技术与免疫调节相结合，代表了一种提高癌症治疗功效和安全性的有前景的策略。尽管具有巨大的临床前潜力，但临床转化受到药理学、药效学和长期安全性方面相互关联的挑战的阻碍。这种以机制为导向的前瞻性分析了转化瓶颈、生物分子冠的药理学不确定性、肿瘤屏障导致的次优药效以及影响生物安全的代谢/排泄。使用概念驱动的框架，我们在“屏障策略”范式内将纳米生物相互作用与临床结果联系起来。讨论了机制驱动设计、人工智能辅助优化和先进输送系统等相应策略，重点关注设计安全原则。总的来说，这一观点为未来的研究提供了前瞻性的路线图，强调了集成技术、先进的转化模型和可扩展制造对于充分实现纳米免疫疗法的临床潜力的重要性。

medical_news.title: New depression treatment targets the immune system instead of the brain
medical_news.abstract: A surprising new approach to depression treatment is showing early promise — not by targeting brain chemicals, but by calming the immune system. In a small clinical trial, researchers found that an anti-inflammatory drug normally used for rheumatoid arthritis appeared to ease symptoms in people with hard-to-treat depression, while also reducing fatigue and anxiety and improving quality of life.

medical_news.title_cn: 新的抑郁症治疗针对的是免疫系统而不是大脑
medical_news.abstract_cn: 一种令人惊讶的抑郁症治疗新方法已显示出早期前景——不是通过针对大脑化学物质，而是通过镇静免疫系统。在一项小型临床试验中，研究人员发现，一种通常用于治疗类风湿关节炎的抗炎药似乎可以缓解难以治疗的抑郁症患者的症状，同时还能减少疲劳和焦虑，提高生活质量。

medical_news.title: Scientists create supercharged vitamin K that helps the brain heal itself
medical_news.abstract: Scientists in Japan have created powerful new vitamin K-based compounds that may help the brain regenerate lost neurons — a breakthrough that could one day change how diseases like Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s are treated. By combining vitamin K with components related to vitamin A, the researchers developed compounds that were about three times more effective at turning neural stem cells into neurons than natural vitamin K alone.

medical_news.title_cn: 科学家创造出超强维生素 K，帮助大脑自我修复
medical_news.abstract_cn: 日本科学家创造出了强大的新型维生素 K 化合物，可以帮助大脑再生丢失的神经元——这一突破有一天可能会改变阿尔茨海默氏症和帕金森氏症等疾病的治疗方式。通过将维生素 K 与维生素 A 相关成分相结合，研究人员开发出的化合物将神经干细胞转变为神经元的效率比单独使用天然维生素 K 的效果高出约三倍。

medical_news.title: Scientists discover why Ozempic and Wegovy weight loss eventually plateaus
medical_news.abstract: New NIH research reveals that semaglutide sparks different responses inside appetite-controlling brain cells, offering fresh insight into why GLP-1 weight-loss drugs don’t work the same for everyone. Scientists also found a possible way to extend the drugs’ effects, potentially helping patients push past weight-loss plateaus.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists discover why Ozempic and Wegovy weight loss eventually plateaus
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家发现为什么 Ozempic 和 Wegovy 减肥最终会趋于平稳
medical_news.abstract_cn: NIH 的新研究表明，索马鲁肽会在控制食欲的脑细胞内引发不同的反应，为为什么 GLP-1 减肥药对每个人的作用不同提供了新的见解。科学家们还找到了一种延长药物疗效的可能方法，有可能帮助患者突破减肥平台期。
